component.name: Text
component.description: Renders body-level text using semantic size tokens. Covers body copy, small text, metadata, and label sizes. Polymorphic via the as prop. Does not add margin.
component.figmaNodeId: N/A — Text uses Figma text styles, not a component set. Code Connect requires Enterprise plan.

when: Rendering body copy, descriptions, or explanatory prose
Rendering UI labels that are not interactive (use Button for clickable labels)
Rendering supporting metadata such as timestamps, counts, or secondary context

patterns.name: body-section
patterns.description: A Heading followed by Text inside a Stack to form a titled content block.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Text for page headings or section titles
antiPatterns.reason: Text is sized for body content. Heading sizes start at title-small.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Heading with size title-small, subheader, headline, headline-serif, or display

antiPatterns.reason: Text is a leaf node. Nesting creates redundant markup.
antiPatterns.alternative: Place both Text elements inside a Stack or Inline

antiPatterns.reason: htmlFor is declared on TextProps but not destructured out, so it always falls into ...rest and is spread onto whatever element as renders — nothing restricts it to label, so it can render an invalid for attribute on a non-label element.
antiPatterns.alternative: Only pass htmlFor when as="label"; for any other element, omit it.

antiPatterns.scenario: Nesting Text as="span" inside a Heading to recolor part of the heading text
antiPatterns.reason: Every Text size option other than inherit sets its own font-family/font-size/font-weight/line-height, which overrides the Heading's typography instead of just changing color.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pass size="inherit" so the span only changes color and inherits typography from the Heading.

purpose.body-default: Standard body copy. 1rem, regular weight, 1.5 line-height.
purpose.body-small: Secondary body text or sidebar content. 0.875rem, 1.4 line-height.
purpose.metadata: Supporting details such as timestamps, counts, tags. 0.875rem.
purpose.label: UI labels for form fields and controls. 1rem, bold weight, single line-height.
purpose.inherit: No typography of its own — font-family/size/weight/line-height inherit from the parent. Use only when nesting Text as="span" inside a Heading (or other typographic ancestor) purely to change color.

purpose.default: Primary reading colour on the page surface.
purpose.subtle: De-emphasised secondary text and supporting metadata.
purpose.brand: Brand-coloured emphasis; use sparingly for accent text.
purpose.disabled: Text in a disabled or inactive context.
purpose.inverted: Primary text colour on an inverted (dark) surface, e.g. a CTA banner or footer.
purpose.inverted-subtle: De-emphasised text on an inverted (dark) surface.
purpose.accent-inverted: Accent-coloured emphasis on an inverted (dark) surface.

accessibility.notes: Use the as prop to select a semantically meaningful element when needed (e.g. as=span for inline text, as=p for block paragraphs — p is the default).
